title: Ethiopian-Style Keto Flatbread with Crunchy Topping
description: A crispy flatbread topped with a crunchy, cool and flavorful Ethiopian-inspired topping. Perfect for keto dieters.
instructions: Place flatbread pieces on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
While the flatbread is baking, toast perilla leaves in a dry pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and top each piece with a toasted perilla leaf.
Add a spoonful of cool crunchy topping on top of each flatbread piece.
